body: Planning a trip to Japan next spring. Any must-visit places besides Tokyo and Kyoto?
Hiroshima is incredible. The Peace Memorial is deeply moving and Miyajima Island is right nearby.
Kanazawa is underrated! Beautiful gardens, a samurai district, and amazing fresh seafood market.
Is the JR Pass worth it if I'm traveling between multiple cities?
Absolutely, especially for long-distance shinkansen trips. Calculate your routes first though — sometimes individual tickets are cheaper.
